notes.fitness_sd: Experimental DMS fitness spread at a residue position; post-hoc control, not a prospective feature.
notes.model_score_sd: ESM score spread at a residue position; model-sensitivity control, not independent biology.
notes.msa_conservation: One minus MSA normalized entropy; higher values are more conserved.
notes.msa_match_state_coverage: 1.0 if this position is represented by an MSA match-state column; 0.0 if it is query-only/lowercase in the ProteinGym A2M.
notes.msa_normalized_entropy: MSA-derived amino-acid entropy normalized by log(20); higher values are less conserved.
notes.msa_wild_type_frequency: MSA-derived frequency of the wild-type amino acid at this position.
notes.mutation_count: Number of scored single mutants observed at a residue position.
notes.structure_burial_approx: One minus structure_relative_sasa_approx; higher values are more buried by this structure proxy.
notes.structure_contact_count_10a: C-beta/C-alpha contact count within 10 A; burial/exposure proxy, not full SASA.
notes.structure_relative_sasa_approx: Approximate residue SASA divided by the maximum residue SASA observed in the same structure.
notes.structure_sasa_approx: Approximate residue solvent-accessible surface area in A^2 from heavy atoms using a lightweight Shrake-Rupley-style calculation.
